title: reset
text: reset Reset the value of the specified ProcScript function to 0 . reset ProcScriptFunction Example: reset $procerror Parameters Table 1. Parameters Parameter Data Type Description ProcScriptFunction Literal ProcScript function Return Values Table 2. Values returned in $status Value Meaning <0 reset cannot be used with ProcScriptFunction . 0 ProcScriptFunction was successfully reset. Use Allowed in all component types except self-contained Report and Services. Description The reset statement resets the value of the ProcScript function ProcScriptFunction to FALSE ( 0 ). It can be used only with functions for which this feature is documented. Example: Resetting $formmod The following example sets the CITY field in a form, then resets the component instance modification indicator, $formmod : operation exec city = "New Orleans" ; this sets $formmod to 1 reset $formmod edit NAME end Copy Related Links set Set the value of the specified ProcScript function to 1 (TRUE).
